examples: RESULTS the alkannin could inhibit the proliferation of the cells with dependence of concentration and time.
The results showed that the alkannin content was 0.15 %, the Lithospermum plastic had the best antioxidant and refreshing activity.
E. coli, Staphylococcus aureus, Rhizopus, Mucor, etc. were the indicators. This essay investigated the effect of different alkannin content on bacteriostatic activity of the Lithospermum plastic.
